scripts.lint: npm run lint -w services/authentication && npm run lint -w services/banking && npm run lint -w services/observability && npm run lint -w services/ui
scripts.format: npm run format -w services/authentication && npm run format -w services/banking && npm run format -w services/observability && npm run format -w services/ui
scripts.test: npm run test -w services/authentication && npm run test -w services/banking && npm run test -w services/observability && npm run test -w services/ui
